title: REVIEW SYMPOSIUM
abstract: Click to increase image sizeClick to decrease image size Acknowledgment Thanks to Sybil Durand for research assistance. Notes 1. The author would like to thank Lois Weis for her critical feedback on this review. 1. Though the series just started in 2005, it is noteworthy that of the first fourteen scholars to be selected, none are women. 2. William Watkins (1994 Watkins, W. 1994. Multicultural education: toward a historical and political inquiry. Educational Theory, 44(1): 99–116. [Crossref] , [Google Scholar]) does not directly discuss Banks's scholarship, but many of Watkins astute observations of the limits of multicultural education can be applied to Banks and this collection.
authors_text: Dimitriadis, Greg; Sleeter, Christine E.; Dolby, Nadine
journal: British Journal of Sociology of Education
